note: All field definitions are derived from spec/probe-types.ts which is the single authoritative source of truth. Flutter/iOS/Android native SDKs use a simplified 7-type ProbeType enum (control/display/input/navigation/container/media/feedback) vs the spec's 9-type enum — this is a known platform divergence.

entities.name: ProbeElement
entities.description: Core element model. Every annotated UI control is represented as a ProbeElement with 15 attributes. This is the central data type — all 6 primitives operate on ProbeElement instances.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Semantic identifier, e.g. 'order-list'. The only required annotation attribute. Used as the registry key.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Widget type from the 9-value ProbeType enum. Determines the shape of the data field extensions.

fields.name: accessibility
fields.description: A11y metadata: role, label, tabIndex. Sourced from ARIA attributes (web) or platform accessibility APIs.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Real-time element state. Always present. Contains current state string, previous state, timestamp, isOpen flag for modals, and validation errors.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Data payload whose structure extends by ProbeType. Core fields: value, options, rows, columns. data-container adds sort/filter/selectedRows; media adds currentTime/duration/readyState/paused/networkState.

fields.name: source
fields.description: API data source binding. Set when the element has a data-probe-source annotation and the corresponding network request has been intercepted.

fields.name: linkage
fields.description: Inter-element linkage declarations. Contains an array of LinkageTarget objects, each describing a downstream element, the expected effect, and the path type.

fields.name: layout
fields.description: Layout metrics from the rendering engine: x, y, width, height, visible flag, renderTime, scrollTop, scrollLeft. Always present — computed at scan time.

fields.name: shortcuts
fields.description: Keyboard shortcuts bound to this element. Each shortcut has a key string, action description, and optional platform specifier.

fields.name: animation
fields.description: Animation state: playing flag, name, duration in ms, progress fraction 0-1.

fields.name: locale
fields.description: Locale and directionality: language code, direction (ltr/rtl), isRTL boolean.

fields.name: theme
fields.description: Theme context: mode (light/dark/high-contrast) and colorScheme string.

fields.name: eventBindings
fields.description: Array of DOM event type names bound to this element (e.g. ['click', 'change', 'input']).

fields.name: session
fields.description: Session/form dirty state: isDirty and hasUnsavedChanges flags.

fields.name: parent
fields.description: Probe ID of the parent element. Used to build the hierarchy tree and support ancestor-chain visibility checks.

fields.name: children
fields.description: Array of probe IDs of direct child elements. Supports queryChildren() and queryDescendants() hierarchy operations.

relationships.description: ProbeElements form a tree. parent holds a single probe ID; children holds an array of probe IDs.
An element with linkage declarations points to one or more downstream LinkageTarget elements.
An element with a data-probe-source annotation has one correlated SourceInfo once the network request completes.

entities.name: StateInfo
entities.description: Real-time state of a probe element. current is the authoritative state string; previous allows detecting transitions; timestamp records when the last change occurred.

fields.name: current
fields.description: Current state string, e.g. 'loaded', 'loading', 'error', 'disabled', 'submitting', 'idle'.

fields.name: previous
fields.description: State value before the most recent transition.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the current state was set.

fields.name: isOpen
fields.description: For modal-type elements: true if the modal is open. Undefined for other types.

fields.name: validationErrors
fields.description: Validation error messages. If present and non-empty, the DISABLED pre-check includes the error messages as the 'reason' field.

entities.name: DataInfo
entities.description: Data payload for a probe element. Core fields are shared across all types; type-specific extensions are documented in type_specific_shapes.

fields.name: value
fields.description: Current value of the element (input value, selected option, etc.).

fields.name: options
fields.description: Available options for selector-type elements. Used by the 5th pre-check in select() to validate the requested value.

fields.name: rows
fields.description: Row count for data-container elements.

fields.name: columns
fields.type: Array<{ id: string; label: string; visible: boolean }>
fields.description: Column definitions for table/grid data-container elements.

fields.name: sort
fields.description: Active sort state (data-container only).

fields.name: filter
fields.type: Array<{ field: string; operator: string; value: unknown }>
fields.description: Active filter criteria (data-container only).

fields.name: selectedRows
fields.description: IDs or indices of selected rows (data-container only).

fields.name: currentTime
fields.description: Playback position in seconds (media only).

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Total duration in seconds (media only).

fields.name: readyState
fields.description: HTMLMediaElement readyState value 0-4 (media only).

fields.name: paused
fields.description: Whether the media is currently paused (media only).

fields.name: networkState
fields.description: HTMLMediaElement networkState value 0-3 (media only).

entities.name: SourceInfo
entities.description: API data source binding. Populated by the SourceTracker when a network request matching the element's data-probe-source annotation completes.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The matched request URL.

fields.name: method
fields.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.).

fields.name: status
fields.description: HTTP response status code.

fields.name: responseTime
fields.description: Response time in milliseconds.

fields.name: payload
fields.description: Parsed response body. Populated for JSON responses.

entities.name: LinkageInfo
entities.description: Container for the element's linkage declarations — the downstream elements this element drives when interacted with.

fields.name: targets
fields.description: Array of downstream elements this element drives, with their expected effects and path types.

entities.name: LinkageTarget
entities.description: A single downstream element that a triggering element affects. Declares the target probe ID, the expected effect, and the path mechanism through which the effect travels.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Probe ID of the downstream element.

fields.name: effect
fields.description: Expected effect: options_update, data_reload, visibility_toggle, enabled_toggle, value_update, reset, or navigate.

fields.name: path
fields.description: The mechanism through which the effect travels. One of: direct, api, computed, store, navigation, or chain.

entities.name: LinkagePath
entities.description: Discriminated union describing the mechanism through which a linkage effect propagates. Each variant carries different metadata.

variants.description: Effect propagates through direct JS event/callback without a network call.
Effect propagates via an API call to the specified URL.
Effect is computed from a formula or derived value.
Effect propagates through a state store (Redux, Vuex, Pinia, etc.).
Effect is a navigation to a route.
Effect chains through an intermediate element identified by its probe ID.

entities.name: LayoutInfo
entities.description: Layout metrics from the rendering engine. Present on every ProbeElement. Computed at scan time and updated by the LayoutTracker.

fields.name: x
fields.description: Horizontal position from viewport left edge in CSS pixels.

fields.name: y
fields.description: Vertical position from viewport top edge in CSS pixels.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Element width in CSS pixels.

fields.name: height
fields.description: Element height in CSS pixels.

fields.name: visible
fields.description: Whether the element is geometrically visible in the viewport. Set by IntersectionObserver (web) or platform visibility API. Note: isEffectivelyVisible() checks the full ancestor chain.

fields.name: renderTime
fields.description: Time in milliseconds for the element to render. Populated by PerformanceObserver on web.

fields.name: scrollTop
fields.description: Vertical scroll offset of a scrollable element in pixels.

fields.name: scrollLeft
fields.description: Horizontal scroll offset of a scrollable element in pixels.

entities.name: AccessibilityInfo
entities.description: Accessibility metadata for a probe element.

fields.name: role
fields.description: ARIA role or platform accessibility role string.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Accessible label (aria-label / accessibilityLabel).

fields.name: tabIndex
fields.description: Tab order index.

entities.name: ShortcutInfo
entities.description: A keyboard shortcut bound to a probe element.

fields.name: key
fields.description: Shortcut key string, e.g. 'Ctrl+S' or 'Meta+Shift+Z'.

fields.name: action
fields.description: Description of the action triggered by the shortcut.

fields.name: platform
fields.description: Optional platform specifier (e.g. 'mac', 'windows').

entities.name: AnimationInfo
entities.description: Animation state of a probe element.

fields.name: playing
fields.description: Whether an animation is currently in progress.

fields.name: name
fields.description: CSS animation name or identifier.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Animation duration in milliseconds.

fields.name: progress
fields.description: Animation progress as a fraction 0.0–1.0.

entities.name: LocaleInfo
entities.description: Locale and text directionality information for a probe element.

fields.name: language
fields.description: BCP 47 language code, e.g. 'en-US', 'zh-CN', 'ar'.

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Text direction.

fields.name: isRTL
fields.description: Convenience flag equivalent to direction === 'rtl'.

entities.name: ThemeInfo
entities.description: Theme context for a probe element.

fields.name: mode
fields.description: Active theme mode.

fields.name: colorScheme
fields.description: Optional named color scheme string.

entities.name: SessionInfo
entities.description: Form / session dirty state for a probe element.

fields.name: isDirty
fields.description: Whether the element's value has been changed since last save/load.

fields.name: hasUnsavedChanges
fields.description: Whether the element has unsaved changes pending.

entities.name: PlatformContext
entities.description: Describes the platform, device, viewport, and input mode under which a test is running. Used by runAcrossDevices() matrix testing and auto-detected by the web SDK from the browser environment.

fields.name: platform
fields.description: The platform enum value (web-chrome, web-safari, ios, android, etc.).

fields.name: device
fields.description: The device profile describing screen size, pixel ratio, form factor, notch, and safe area.

fields.name: viewport
fields.description: Current viewport dimensions in CSS pixels.

fields.name: inputMode
fields.description: Primary input modality: touch, mouse_keyboard, stylus, or gamepad.

entities.name: DeviceProfile
entities.description: Physical device characteristics. Used within PlatformContext and loaded from spec/devices.json for the 11 named presets.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable device name, e.g. 'iPhone 15 Pro'.

fields.name: screenSize
fields.description: Physical screen size in CSS reference pixels.

fields.name: pixelRatio
fields.description: Device pixel ratio (DPR).

fields.name: hasNotch
fields.description: Whether the device has a display notch or Dynamic Island.

fields.name: hasSafeArea
fields.description: Whether the device has safe area insets.

fields.name: formFactor
fields.description: Device form factor: phone, tablet, desktop, or foldable.

entities.name: ProbeSnapshot
entities.description: A point-in-time snapshot of all registered probe elements and the platform context. Used as a regression baseline for diff() comparison.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the snapshot was taken.

fields.name: elements
fields.description: Map from probe ID to ProbeElement for all registered elements at snapshot time.

fields.name: platformContext
fields.description: The platform context at snapshot time.

entities.name: SnapshotDiff
entities.description: A single field-level difference between two ProbeSnapshot instances. diff() returns an array of SnapshotDiff objects.

fields.name: elementId
fields.description: Probe ID of the element that changed.

fields.name: field
fields.description: Dot-path of the changed field, e.g. 'state.current' or 'data.rows'.

fields.name: before
fields.description: Field value in snapshot a.

fields.name: after
fields.description: Field value in snapshot b.

entities.name: NetworkLogEntry
entities.description: A single intercepted network request. Returned by getNetworkLog(). May be correlated to a probe element if the URL matched a data-probe-source annotation.

fields.name: url
fields.description: Request URL.

fields.name: method
fields.description: HTTP method.

fields.name: status
fields.description: HTTP response status code.

fields.name: elementId
fields.description: Probe ID of the element whose source annotation matched this request, if any.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the request was initiated.

entities.name: TestResult
entities.description: Per-device result from runAcrossDevices(). The composite return type is Record<string, TestResult> keyed by device name.

fields.name: device
fields.description: The device preset name used for this run.

fields.name: passed
fields.description: Whether the test function completed without throwing.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Test execution time in milliseconds.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the test threw. Undefined if passed=true.

entities.name: ProbeActionError
entities.description: Thrown (as a plain object, not an Error instance) by all action methods when a pre-check fails. Contains a machine-readable error code and the target probe ID.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Machine-readable error code identifying which pre-check failed.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Probe ID of the element that failed the pre-check.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Human-readable detail. For DISABLED: includes validation error messages. For BUSY: 'Element is loading' or 'Element is submitting'.

fields.name: available
fields.description: For OPTION_NOT_FOUND only: the list of valid option strings from data.options.

entities.name: ActAndWaitResult
entities.description: Return value of actAndWait(). Includes timing breakdowns, the final state of the target element, and linkage verification results if linkage was declared.

fields.name: actionDuration
fields.description: Time in milliseconds to dispatch the action.

fields.name: waitDuration
fields.description: Time in milliseconds from action completion to target state being reached.

fields.name: targetState
fields.description: The state of the target element when the wait resolved.

fields.name: linkageResults
fields.description: Linkage verification results if the trigger element had linkage declarations. Undefined if no linkage.

entities.name: LinkageResult
entities.description: Structured result of verifyLinkage(). Contains the trigger element, action string, per-target effect results categorized as direct or chained, and any API calls observed.

fields.name: trigger
fields.description: Probe ID of the element that was interacted with.

fields.name: action
fields.description: Action string that was performed.

fields.name: directEffects
fields.type: Array<{ target: string; effect: string; result: 'pass' | 'fail' | 'timeout'; duration: number }>
fields.description: Per-target results for direct, api, computed, store, and navigation path types.

fields.name: chainedEffects
fields.type: Array<{ target: string; effect: string; through: string; result: 'pass' | 'fail' | 'timeout'; duration: number }>
fields.description: Per-target results for chain path types. Includes the intermediate element ID in the 'through' field.

fields.name: apiCalls
fields.type: Array<{ url: string; method: string; status: number; responseTime: number }>
fields.description: API calls observed during the linkage window for api-type paths.

entities.name: PageQueryResult
entities.description: Return value of queryPage(). Provides a page-level summary without requiring a PAGE-type element to be annotated.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Probe ID of the PAGE element, or 'unknown' if none found.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State of the PAGE element, or derived state ('loading'/'loaded') based on unreadyElements count.

fields.name: elements
fields.description: All registered probe elements on the page.

fields.name: unreadyElements
fields.description: Probe IDs of elements still in loading or submitting state.

enums.name: ProbeType
enums.description: 9 widget categories. The spec defines 9 types; some native platform SDKs (Flutter, iOS, Android) use a simplified 7-type enum — this is a known divergence.

values.description: Table, grid, list, or any container displaying rows of data. Enables sort/filter/selectedRows data extensions.
Dropdown, radio group, segmented control, or any element where the user selects one option from a list.
Button, link, icon button, or any element whose primary purpose is triggering an action.
Text, badge, label, tooltip, or any read-only display element.
Video, audio, or any media player element. Enables currentTime/duration/readyState/paused/networkState data extensions.
Input field, textarea, or any element that accepts user text/value input.
The root page or screen element. Used by waitForPageReady() as the primary readiness signal.
Dialog, drawer, sheet, or any overlay element. The state.isOpen field carries the open/closed flag.
Tab bar, side nav, breadcrumb, or any navigation structure element.

enums.name: LinkageEffect
enums.description: 7 effect types describing what a linkage target experiences when its trigger is interacted with.

values.description: The target selector's options list is refreshed (e.g. city dropdown updates when province changes).
The target data-container reloads its rows from the API.
The target element appears or disappears.
The target element transitions between enabled and disabled states.
The target element's value field is updated.
The target element is reset to its initial/empty state.
A navigation to a new route is triggered.

enums.name: ViewportPreset
enums.description: 11 named device presets from spec/devices.json. Pass to setDevice() or runAcrossDevices().

values.description: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 — 800×1280, 2x DPR, tablet
Samsung Galaxy Z Fold — 717×953 folded, 2x DPR, foldable

type_specific_shapes.description: Tables, grids, and lists. In addition to core data fields (value, options, rows, columns), the data field gains sort/filter/selectedRows.

extra_fields.name: filter
extra_fields.type: Array<{ field: string; operator: string; value: unknown }>

extra_fields.name: selectedRows
extra_fields.description: Probe IDs or indices of currently selected rows.

extra_fields.name: columns
extra_fields.type: Array<{ id: string; label: string; visible: boolean }>
extra_fields.description: Column definitions including visibility toggle state.

type_specific_shapes.description: Video and audio players. Gains media-specific data fields matching HTMLMediaElement properties.

extra_fields.name: options
extra_fields.description: Available option values. Required for the OPTION_NOT_FOUND pre-check on select().

extra_fields.name: validationErrors
extra_fields.description: Stored in state.validationErrors — used by DISABLED pre-check reason.

extra_fields.name: isOpen
extra_fields.description: Stored in state.isOpen. True when the modal is displayed.

type_specific_shapes.description: Tab bars, side navs, breadcrumbs, and navigation containers.

extra_fields.name: value
extra_fields.description: Active route or selected tab identifier.

type_specific_shapes.description: Buttons, links, and icon buttons. No data extensions. State indicates loading/submitting for async actions.
Read-only text, badges, labels, and tooltips. No data extensions beyond value.
The root page/screen element. Used as the primary readiness signal by waitForPageReady().
